market_summary: Risk-off week. BTC held $73-74K range amid $1.55B ETF outflow streak (6 days). ETH testing $2K support, ETH/BTC ratio at 0.027 multi-year low. Gold at $4,536 forming descending triangle at critical $4,500 support. Silver consolidating $71-88 range. Oil crashed 19% in May (Brent $92.56) on US-Iran ceasefire hopes. MSTR mNAV compressed below 1.0x.

key_events_tomorrow.note: Prior was 115K (soft). Another weak number shifts rate cut expectations
Following May 188K bbl/day increase. Production decision critical
New chair, new dot plot. Powell term ended May 15

overnight_risks: US-Iran 60-day ceasefire MOU not yet signed - binary risk for oil/risk assets
Strait of Hormuz partially blocked since Feb 28 - any weekend escalation spikes oil
BTC ETF 6-day outflow streak ($1.55B) - institutional de-risking
Gold descending triangle at $4,500 - breakdown risk
Asia markets cautious on US-Iran uncertainty

instrument_news.BTC-USD: BlackRock IBIT lost $528M on May 28 (2nd largest outflow ever). YTD net ETF inflows shrunk to $536M. $73-74K range holding. 401(k) crypto allocation DoL guidance expected H1 2026 - major catalyst.
instrument_news.ETH-USD: ETH/BTC at 0.027 multi-year low. 10+ day ETF outflow streak. Down 32% YTD. Glamsterdam upgrade (H1 2026) and Hegota (H2 2026) upcoming. Pectra already priced in.
instrument_news.XAU-USD: Descending triangle at $4,500 critical support. Central bank buying 244t Q1 2026 (+3% YoY) provides floor. UBS targets $5,900 despite sell-off. Down 18.8% from Jan ATH $5,598.
instrument_news.XAG-USD: Consolidating at $75 pivot. UBS revised supply deficit down to 60-70M oz (from 300M). Key: $71 support, $79-80 resistance. Gold-silver ratio ~60.1.
instrument_news.MSTR: mNAV compressed below 1.0x (~0.94x). Holds 843,738 BTC (4.018% total supply) at avg $75,700. Market pricing in dilution/execution risk.

metals_outlook: Gold pivoting on $4,500 - descending triangle bearish if broken. Central bank buying (244t/Q1) provides structural floor but insufficient for new highs. Silver supply deficit revised down by UBS (60-70M oz vs 300M prior) - bearish fundamental shift. Gold-silver ratio at 60.1, compressed from 90. Industrial demand narrative intact but questioned.
oil_outlook: Brent crashed to $92.56, down 19% in May (worst since COVID). US-Iran ceasefire MOU close but unsigned - BINARY: success pushes Brent to $85-88, failure spikes above $100-110. OPEC+ meeting June 7 following 188K bbl/day increase. Strait of Hormuz partially blocked since Feb 28. UAE departed OPEC+.
sentiment_shift: Institutional risk-off across crypto and metals. ETF outflows dominating. Oil volatility extreme. Market waiting for macro clarity: NFP (Jun 6), OPEC+ (Jun 7), FOMC (Jun 16-17). First Warsh-led FOMC meeting will set tone for H2 2026.
